name: Concrete Beam Calculator
seo_description: Ordering concrete for structural beams? Enter beam width, depth, length and quantity to calculate volume, cement bags, steel weight and formwork area.
example_label: Calculate materials for 4 beams each 5m long, 0.25m wide and 0.50m deep.
result_context: Each beam requires {vol_unitario} m³. Total: {vol_total} m³ of concrete, {cemento_sacos} bags of cement, {acero_kg} kg of steel and {encofrado_m2} m² of formwork.
formula_display: Volume = Length x Width x Depth; Steel = Volume x Density
steps: Calculate formwork: 2(0.25+0.50)×5×4 = 30m² (excludes bottom if bearing on wall)
mistakes: Incorrect depth-to-span ratio leading to excessive deflection
Placing tension reinforcement in the wrong zone (must be at bottom for simply supported beams)
Insufficient anchorage length at beam supports
description: Calculate materials for reinforced concrete beams.
desc: Calculate materials for reinforced concrete beams.
